case_title: HYUNG SHIN VS. DIRECT TO HOME APPLIANCES, LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2012 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORTE TO FEB-16-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,241.66 FILED BY SHIN, HYUNG AS TO DEFENDANT DIRECT TO HOME APPLIANCES, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHIN, HYUNG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIRECT TO HOME APPLIANCES, LLC $5,421.66 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,496.66, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2011 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-19-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2011 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-15-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY BARBARICH, STEVE OWNER, DIRECT TO HOME APPLIANCES LLC. HEARING SET FOR SEP-01-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2011 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-13-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES AGREED THAT THE DEFENDANT WILL PAY $800.00 PER MONTH FOR 5 MONTHS, WITH THE BALANCE BEING OWED THE FOLLOWNG MONTH FOR A TOTAL OF 6 PAYMENTS. THE DEFENDANT PAID THE FIRST PAYMENT TODAY WITH A COMPANY CHECK IN THE AMOUNT OF $800.00. THE FIRST PROGRESS REPORT DATE IS SCHEDULED FOR OCTOBER 13, 2011. IF NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUE MONTHLY FOR PROGRESS REPORTS. JUDGE: DOANLD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DIRECT TO HOME APPLIANCES, LLC
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, PER REQUEST OF THE JUDGMENT CREDITORS PROGRESS REPORT OF 2/16/12. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *(NO ATTACHED DECLARATION OF MAILINGS)* (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED DEC-15-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DIRECT TO HOME APPLIANCES, LLC
